events.label: assistant
events.text: I evaluated the scenario as a **pass** (low risk): the closeout evidence shows the overcurrent devices installed per the referenced detail with clearances, labels, supports, and terminations in place, and no open correction note — nothing points to a code violation. I flagged follow-up verification items (trip settings vs. coordination study, termination torque/110.14(C) ratings, functional GFCI/AFCI testing) as pre-final-signoff actions since those aren't confirmable from photos alone. Written to `/app/answer.json`.
